bugs.desc: Contractor type dropdown not saving Prime selection.
Project save requires 2 taps. Draft discard fails with 'no such column: project_id' in equipment table.
Unarchive toggle from Archived tab fails silently.
No contractor name edit UI — card only expands, no edit dialog.
OBS: Sync failed 2 times after assignment removal, 3 pending changes.
BUG-11: Photo thumbnail delete button (GestureDetector) has no testing key.
BUG-9: TextEditingController used after disposed in photo detail dialog (2x), plus _dependents.isEmpty assertion failure.
BUG-12: Equipment Chip deleteIcon not tappable by key — key targets Chip wrapper, not × icon.
BUG-10: Duplicate GlobalKeys (_OverlayEntryWidgetState) on project edit navigation.
BUG-13: No delete UI for saved form responses — ListTile only shows Open button.
BUG-14: inject-photo-direct creates records without file_path, violating Supabase NOT NULL constraint.
BUG-15: Integrity check RPC returns remote=-1 for ALL tables. Entire integrity check system broken.
BUG-16: Inspector can edit project fields — TextFormField is not readOnly.

BUG-17 (CRITICAL): After sign-out/sign-in, clearLocalCompanyData wipes all data. Sync pulls project metadata but skips ALL child tables ('no loaded projects'). Dashboard shows 0 entries, 0 pay items, 0 contractors. Project enrollment broken after re-login.
OBS: Inspector still sees E2E project despite assignment removal — project cached locally.

observations: Pay item E2E-200 ID: c56fad2d-f614-4079-b631-0582b5568002 — DELETED
clearLocalCompanyData wipes ALL tables on sign-out
After re-login: fetchRemoteProjects shows 'available (unenrolled)=4' — projects not enrolled
Pull skip (no loaded projects) for ALL 15 child tables
Tapping project card pulled 4 records but projects STILL not loaded for child sync
Integrity checks: ALL tables show 'RPC returned unexpected type' — RPC completely broken
10 total error log entries across full session
